name: getTransaction
title: Get Transaction
description: Look up a transaction by hash. Returns signed data, consensus position, and execution result.

hash.description: Transaction hash as a hex string (64 hex chars). This is the hash returned from transact, signAndSubmit, or submit tools.

tx.description: The signed transaction data including origin address, sequence number, and code

position.description: Position of the transaction in the consensus ordering [block-index, tx-index]

result.description: Execution result of the transaction including value, error code (if failed), and metadata

found.description: True if the transaction was found, false otherwise
